ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "mail_address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the mail_address table */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the occupations table */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Student, Software Engineer, Sales, Teacher, Faculty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occupation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occupation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_occupations" (
  "user_occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user occupation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user occupation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user occupation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_occupations_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_occupations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, update profile) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Date of the password reset request */,
  "reset_code" TEXT /* Reset code sent to the user */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reset code has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mail_address" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mail address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mail address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the mail address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the mail address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the mail address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mail address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mail address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mail_address_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact information */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system configuration */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the system configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the system configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
